description_long: This is a round cake with a smooth, white frosted top and a thick, dark chocolate exterior that wraps around the sides. The cake is decorated with a series of evenly spaced, glossy purple dollops of icing arranged in a partial arc along the edge of the top surface. The sides of the cake show a slightly textured chocolate finish, with small pockmarks and a matte appearance. The cake sits on a scalloped, gold-colored cardboard base, which provides a subtle contrast to the cake's dark and light tones. A single slice has been cut from the cake, revealing a clean edge and suggesting a soft, moist interior.
description: A round cake with white frosting, chocolate sides, and purple icing dollops, displayed on a gold scalloped base. One slice is cut out, showing a soft interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cut slice, white frosted top, chocolate sides, and purple icing dollops.
description_view_1: Side view with the cut slice less visible, highlighting the arc of purple icing dollops and the gold base.
description_view_2: Rear view with the full arc of purple icing dollops visible and no cut slice in sight.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the continuous chocolate side and the arrangement of purple icing dollops.
